query:
SELECT id, status, likes, comments, instagramPostId FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND likes > 0 LIMIT 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_published, SUM(likes) as total_likes, SUM(comments) as total_comments FROM posts WHERE status = 'published';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute SELECT id, status, likes, comments, instagramPostId FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND likes > 0 LIMIT 5;
